query: SELECT id, name, LEFT(painPoints, 80) as painPoints, LEFT(hvcoTopic, 80) as hvcoTopic, LEFT(uniqueMechanismSuggestion, 80) as uniqueMechanism FROM services ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
